hook: Strong romantic energy is easier to carry when loneliness is not steering the wheel.
body: A connected social life lowers desperation because connection stops feeling scarce in every direction.

hook: Some men interpret their hunger for romance as chemistry when it is partly hunger for belonging in general.
body: Belonging and dating help each other, but they should not be forced to do the same job.

hook: Belonging and dating help each other, but they should not be forced to do the same job.
body: A man who feels seen by friends often dates with more patience than one asking every woman to fix his isolation.
